name: Apricot Oatmeal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix oats, apricots, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
3. Stir in honey until well combined.
4. Pour mixture into an ungreased 9x13 inch pan.
5. Bake for 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Allow bars to cool completely before cutting into squares.
